title: Maximum Average Subarray I
problem_statement: Find the maximum average value of a subarray with length k.

examples.explanation: The subarray [12,-5,-6,50] has the highest average 12.75.

intuition: Use a fixed-size sliding window and maintain the sum as the window moves.

approaches.name: Sliding window sum
approaches.description: Compute the sum of the first k elements, then update it by subtracting the leftmost element and adding the next element.
approaches.why_not: Recomputing the sum for each window from scratch is O(nk) and too slow.

interview_qa.a: It allows updating the window total in constant time for each move.

interview_qa.q: How do you compute the final average?
interview_qa.a: Divide the maximum window sum by k.
